title: West Bengal news LIVE: BJP workers protest, block highway after Suvendu's aide Chandranath Rath murdered
description: Chandranath Rath murder news LIVE: Amid tensions over Chandranath Rath's murder, BJP leader Arjun Singh made a massive claim, alleging that TMC leader Abhishek Banerjee was involved in the killing of Suvendu Adhikari's PA. He also alleged that the offence was committed by a sharpshooter.
